ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Slalom, Giant Slalom) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the event takes place */,
  "competition_level" TEXT /* Level of competition (e.g., Carnival, Championship) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed in the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the athlete belongs to */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the athlete competes in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the athlete in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the athlete's profile picture */,
  "medical_information" TEXT /* Any relevant medical information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_sport FOREIGN KEY ("sport") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Placement of the athlete in the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the athlete to complete the event */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the athlete for the event */,
  "ranking_points" INTEGER /* Additional points for ranking purposes */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the athlete's performance */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to a video of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the team competes in */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Team's color */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "equipment_required" TEXT /* Equipment required for the sport */,
  "rules_and_regulations" TEXT /* Rules and regulations of the sport */,
  "safety_guidelines" TEXT /* Safety guidelines for the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the season */,
  "number_of_events" INTEGER /* Number of events in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
column_names: Type of the event (e.g., Slalom, Giant Slalom)
Season in which the event takes place
Location where the event is held
Maximum number of participants allowed in the event
Status of the event (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Canceled)
Date of birth of the athlete
Height of the athlete in centimeters
Weight of the athlete in kilograms
URL to the athlete's profile picture
Placement of the athlete in the event
Time taken by the athlete to complete the event
Points awarded to the athlete for the event
Link to a video of the event
URL to the team's official website
Rules and regulations of the sport
Number of events in the season
